name: electrical-tripped-breaker
description: One breaker in my DB board keeps tripping. It's the circuit for the bedroom.

hypotheses.label: Faulty appliance overload
evidence_for: Single circuit affected — other circuits fine

hypotheses.label: Undersized breaker
evidence_for: Circuit may have been extended since install
evidence_against: Bedroom circuit rarely overloaded by standard loads

mockAgentOutput.what_we_dont_know: We cannot tell whether the breaker trips immediately on reset or holds for some time before tripping again.
mockAgentOutput.why_it_matters: Immediate tripping suggests a hard fault like a short; delayed tripping suggests an overload or loose connection.

chips.text: It trips immediately when I reset it.
It holds for a while then trips again.
It trips only when a specific device is on.

expected.must_ask_about: whether breaker trips immediately or after a delay
